data.title: 国际服特别OST「Love Parade」特别礼物兑换码
data.summary: [Special Gift to Celebrate the Release of the C&C Special OST 'Love Parade'!] Sensei, are you enjoyi
data.body:
[Special Gift to Celebrate the Release of the C&C Special OST 'Love Parade'!]

Sensei, are you enjoying your time at the Millennium Expo?

To celebrate the release of the C&C special OST Love Parade, we’ve prepared a special gift to add even more excitement to the Expo!

Redeem the coupon code to receive your gift, and enjoy the soundtrack Love Parade from C&C~ 🎵

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3044671

![pic](images/timeline/kbWqE70cIybqBPITay48KGPzqqPg3uzI.jpg?t=1752989990893)
